title: Ruby additions
description: Adds ruby as a new ore to the game
body:
Ruby Additions
 

Ruby Additions introduces a vibrant new resource to your Minecraft world: Ruby. This mod enriches your gameplay by adding ruby ore, tools, and armor, offering both aesthetic appeal and functional enhancements.

🔨 Ore and tools

- Ruby Ore: Discover ruby ore deep underground. It requires an iron pickaxe or better to mine and drops rubies upon extraction.

- Ruby Tools: Craft almost a full set of ruby tools—sword, pickaxe and shovel (for now). These tools boast durability and efficiency comparable to diamond.

- Ruby Armor: Forge a complete set of ruby armor that offers protection. comparable to the diamond armor

  [curseforge link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ruby-additions)
